settings.title: Notification Settings
settings.autoSaveTooltip: Changes are automatically synced to the server

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.countdownHint: Auto-resubmit when countdown expires. Range 10-3600 seconds, 0 to disable.

bark.urlTemplateHint: Used when Bark Action is Open URL and no explicit URL is supplied. Supports {task_id}, {event_id}, and {base_url}.
bark.baseUrlStatusOk: Current base_url: {url} (Bark notifications open correctly on mobile)
bark.baseUrlStatusLoopback: Current base_url is a loopback address ({url}); Bark notifications cannot open it on mobile devices.
bark.baseUrlStatusUnreachable: No externally reachable base_url detected; the Bark click URL will be omitted.
bark.baseUrlSuggestLan: Suggested fix: copy the LAN address below into web_ui.external_base_url, or change web_ui.host to 0.0.0.0/your LAN IP.
bark.baseUrlSuggestNoLan: No usable LAN interface detected; manually set web_ui.external_base_url to a reachable URL.

hint.coreNotReady: Load failed: notification core module not ready
hint.remoteChanged: Config updated remotely (unsaved local changes); skipped auto-sync to prevent overwrite
hint.notifyDisabled: Notifications are off: enable "Enable Notifications" first
hint.macosNotEnabled: Note: macOS Native Notification is off; running a diagnostic test anyway…
hint.macosTestTriggered: Test notification sent: check your system notifications
hint.postFailed: Send failed: VS Code Webview API unavailable (try reopening the panel or reloading the window)
hint.barkTestSent: Bark test notification sent, please check your device

test.macosMessage: This is a macOS native notification test. If you see this, the config is correct.

footer.versionLinkTitle: Open AI Intervention Agent on GitHub

statusBar.openSettings: Command: AI Intervention Agent: Open settings (serverUrl)

toast.configFallback: Config load failed, using task detail fallback
toast.configFallbackReason: Config load failed, using task detail fallback ({{reason}})

countdown.extendTitle: Extend countdown by 60 seconds (max 3 times per task)
countdown.extendLimitReached: Extension limit reached for this task
countdown.extendFailed: Failed to extend countdown — please retry
countdown.freezeTitle: Permanently disable auto-resubmit for this task
countdown.freezeFailed: Failed to freeze countdown — please retry

task.activateTimeoutCheckServer: Activate task timeout: please check server availability

clipboard.empty: Clipboard is empty, please copy some code first.
clipboard.noCode: Insert failed: no valid code detected

submit.label: Submit feedback
submit.rateLimited: Submitting too frequently, please wait {seconds, plural, one {#s} other {#s}}
submit.rateLimitHint: , please retry after {seconds, plural, one {#s} other {#s}}
submit.timeoutCheckServer: Submit timeout: please check server availability

image.tooManyFiles: Maximum {count, plural, one {# image} other {# images}} allowed

notification.title: AI Intervention Agent
notification.newTasks: Received {count, plural, one {# new task} other {# new tasks}}

hint.serverUrlMissing: Notification config fetch failed: serverUrl is empty

message.default: Waiting for the next feedback request.

message.network: Network unavailable. Please check your connection.
message.server_500: Server returned an error. Please try again later.
message.timeout: Request timed out. The server may be busy.
